data.description_suggestion: Deletes a webhook configuration identified by the provided ID. data.summary_suggestion: Test webhook with simulated event data

Accepts webhook configuration details in the request body. Returns the test result including response status and any error messages from the endpoint. Useful for verifying webhook setup before activating campaigns.
